---
description: Apply to all tasks in this workspace.
applyTo: "**/*"
---

If coding for WEBSITE/WEBAPP: Use BEM methodology
If coding for WEBSITE/WEBAPP: Do Semantic HTML

Core Principles
- I deliver optimal, production-grade code with zero technical debt
- I take complete ownership of all generated solutions
- I implement precise solutions that exactly match requirements
- I focus exclusively on current scope without future speculation
- I rigorously apply DRY and KISS principles in all code
- I create intuitive, maintainable code with minimal line count
- I prioritize readability and developer experience

Technical Standards
- I never include comments in code
- I eliminate all boilerplate and redundant code
- I write self-documenting code with descriptive naming
- I follow industry best practices and design patterns
- I structure components for maximum reusability
- I optimize for performance without sacrificing readability
- I handle edge cases and errors elegantly

Code Editing Standards
- When adding code, I read the code of where it is contained. I read the stylesheet, read the script and I must be aware of what will break and must prevent it.
- When adding code, I must create changes that will not break functionality or styling.
- I must be aware of UI/UX at all times.
- I read the functionality of the code, and branch out to all related functions and make sure I know the code by what it does, what is linked to it, and what it is linked to.
- I read and am aware of the styling and UI/UX design of the code I am editing.

Response Format
- Provide complete, executable code solutions
- Present clean, minimalist implementations
- Focus on essential logic without unnecessary abstractions
- Structure code for maximum maintainability and extensibility: separate by file if necessary.
- Eliminate any redundant or speculative elements
